name: slide-view
description: Deliver a lecture as a slide-view presentation — one idea per screen, prev/next, motion. Skill-only: composes the runtime's <SlideDeck> + motion, no new deps. Folder skill with an index that routes to sub-guides.

skill.loadWhen: the lecture should use a slide view — one idea per screen, paced with prev/next, for a talk, a kiosk, or a tablet
